titulo: DeepHit: A Deep Learning Approach to Survival Analysis with Competing Risks
autor: Changhee Lee, William R. Zame, Jinsung Yoon, Mihaela van der Schaar
resultados: DeepHit provides performance improvements over other models
query: TS=((Deep Learning" AND "Survival Analysis") AND ("Financial Distress" OR "Recurrence" OR "Competing Risks"))"

titulo: The recurrence of financial distress: A survival analysis
autor: Fanyin Zhou, Lijun Fu, Zhiyong Li, Jiawei Xu
resultados: Accounting and market-based variables have limited power in predicting the recurrence of distress. The duration of recovery and restructuring events significantly affect the recurrent risk.
query: TS=(financial distress recurrence" AND "stratified hazard model" AND "Chinese stock market")"

titulo: Modeling default prediction with earnings management
autor: Hsiou-Wei William Lin, Huai-Chun Lo, Ruei-Shian Wu
modelos usados: Z-score methodology, accounting-based credit scoring model
resultados: The inclusion of the indicator variable for real earnings management considerably enhances the explanatory power of Z-score factors for firm survival/default.
query: TS=(default prediction" AND "earnings management" AND "credit scoring")"

titulo: Predicting the risk of financial distress using corporate governance measures
autor: Zhiyong Li, Jonathan Crook, Galina Andreeva, Ying Tang
resultados: Corporate governance alone is not sufficient to accurately predict financial distress, but it can add to the predictive power of financial ratios and macroeconomic factors.
query: TS=((Financial Distress" OR "Corporate Failure") AND ("Corporate Governance" OR "Corporate Governance Measures"))"

titulo: Predicting Financial Distress: A Comparison of Survival Analysis and Decision Tree Techniques
modelos usados: Cox survival analysis model, CART decision trees
resultados: Decision trees and survival analysis models have good prediction accuracy.
query: TS=(financial distress prediction" AND "decision tree" AND "survival analysis")"

titulo: Application of the Random Survival Forests Method in the Bankruptcy Prediction for Small and Medium Enterprises
modelos usados: Random Survival Forests (RSF), Cox regression survival model
resultados: Random Survival Forests provided not only better results but also more stable ones than the semiparametric Cox regression survival model.
query: TS=(random survival forests" AND SME AND "bankruptcy prediction")"

titulo: A multi-task-type bankruptcy prediction method without using financial statements
resultados: The prediction accuracy of multi-task learning outperforms that of conventional single-task learning in some cases.
query: TS=(multi-task learning" AND "bankruptcy prediction" AND "transaction information")"

titulo: A New Discrete Learning-Based Logistic Regression Classifier for Bankruptcy Prediction
autor: Mehdi Khashei, Sepideh Etemadi, Negar Bakhtiarvand
resultados: The proposed discrete direction-based logistic regression classifier can attain a superior performance compared to conventional alternatives.
query: TS=(discrete learning" AND "logistic regression" AND "bankruptcy prediction")"

titulo: Bank failure prediction: corporate governance and financial indicators
autor: Noora Alzayed, Rasol Eskandari, Hassan Yazdifar
resultados: Combining CAMEL ratios with corporate governance variables not only increases the accuracy of prediction but also extends the time horizon to three years before failure.
query: TS=(bank failure" AND "corporate governance" AND "CAMEL ratios")"

titulo: Early Warning Signs of Financial Distress Using Random Forest and Logit Model
autor: Valentino Budhidharma, Roy Sembel, Edison Hulu, Gracia Ugut
resultados: Combining theories, random forests, and logit can be used to build a new financial distress prediction model.
query: TS=(early warning signs" AND "random forest" AND "financial distress")"

resultados: Bank-level financial conditions are more essential in predicting bank failure, although macro factors affect the failure likelihood of vulnerable banks.
query: TS=(macroeconomic conditions" AND "bank failure" AND "hazard model")"

titulo: Corporate financial distress prediction with multiperiod annual report data: A fusion deep neural network model
autor: Chongren Wang, Pimei Gong, Jiawang Li, Zhiyi Wang
resultados: The proposed model demonstrates significant improvements over traditional multiperiod financial indicator-based prediction models.

titulo: Short- and Long-Term Financial Distress Prediction in SMEs: A Survival Model Comparison
modelos usados: Cox Proportional Hazard, Axis-Based Random Survival Forest (RSF), and Accelerated Oblique Random Survival Forest
resultados: Accelerated Oblique RSF gave very good results for short-term predictions, while for long-term predictions, good performances were witnessed with both Accelerated Oblique RSF and Axes-based RSF models.
query: TS=((Financial Distress" OR Bankruptcy) AND ("Survival Analysis" OR "Random Survival Forest" OR "Survival Machine Learning") AND (SME OR PME))"

titulo: Aplicação de Modelos de Machine Learning para Previsão de Eventos de Stress Financeiro
modelos usados: Cox Regression, Random Survival Forest (RSF), Kernel SVM, Multi-Task Logistic Regression (MTLR) e DeepSurv
resultados: All applied models were effective in predicting financial stress events, with Random Survival Forest standing out for its superior performance.
query: TS=(survival machine learning models" AND "financial distress" AND "cox regression")"

titulo: Modelação de Episódios Recorrentes de Stress Financeiro em Empresas: Comparação entre Métodos Multi-Estado Clássicos e Técnicas de Deep Learning de Sobrevivência

autor: Pallavi Sethi, Archana Singh, Vikas Gupta
